title: narcissus vasconicus
intro: Narcissus vasconicus, also known as the Pyrenean Narcissus, is a species of bulbous perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and the Pyrenees. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus vasconicus include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
